title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.190 - Assignee may administer oaths and examine witnesses
text:
426.190.  Assignee may administer oaths and examine witnesses. — The assignee shall have power to administer all necessary oaths to debtors, creditors and witnesses; and may examine them on oath, touching any claim exhibited to him for allowance.
(RSMo 1939 § 5757) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5647; 1919 § 643; 1909 § 916
